title: Steins;Gate
sourceNotes: 24-episode 2011 anime adapts the 2009 visual novel; both anime and the Yomi Sarachi manga retelling (23 chapters / 2 vols) share the same source story. Pacing differs noticeably between adaptations. Steins;Gate 0 (2018 anime + 2017 manga, 41 ch) is a separate parallel-timeline sequel with its own AniList entries.
